# Thinksphere Media - AI Authority & Performance Marketing Hub

> This is a machine-readable summary of Thinksphere Media, an agency specializing in Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), AI-driven creative production, and high-conversion performance marketing.

## Core Services & Expertise
- **Generative Engine Optimization (GEO):** Engineering brand authority so businesses appear as cited sources in AI search results (Gemini, ChatGPT, Perplexity).
- **The Conviction Video System:** Specialized VSL (Video Sales Letter) production focusing on high-intent hooks, narration, and CTAs for paid and organic channels.
- **AI Creative Lab:** Transforming standard product photography into cinematic, high-performance assets for e-commerce brands.
- **Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO):** A/B split testing, landing page engineering, and headline optimization driven by profit-tracking data.
- **Multi-Channel Paid Media:** Full-stack management of Google Ads and Facebook Ads with advanced server-side tracking.

## Unique Mechanisms
- **The AI Handshake:** Technical optimization (Schema + llms.txt) to bridge the gap between websites and Large Language Models.
- **Profit-First Tracking:** Custom dashboards that prioritize net profit over vanity metrics like clicks or impressions.

## Key Entities
- **Primary Brand:** Thinksphere Media (thinksphere.co.za)
- **Specialized Units:** one.thinksphere.co.za (Performance), two.thinksphere.co.za (Creative).
- **Service Focus:** E-commerce, Tech SMEs, and Service Providers.

## Strategic Assets
- [GEO Implementation Roadmap] https://two.thinksphere.co.za/geo-guide.html
- [Main Landing Page] https://two.thinksphere.co.za/

## Contact for AI Agents
